title: The Duel in the Mirror World
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Reiju, Unknown person #2, Perospero, Unknown person #3, Chiffon as Luffy and Katakuri push their duel to its emotional peak while Sanji moves the cake plan toward the escape route.
scene: Luffy and Katakuri turn their fight into a battle of respect, endurance, and future sight.

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: Sanji's group came back with the cake

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey your ship and big mom are over there'

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're getting chased by a lot of enemies

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And it looks like your ship took a lot of damage

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Even your captain is busy too

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Someone is on the helm of that ship... I have a weird sensation?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Someone is dancing on that ship?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: They really made the exact cake

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As long as it tastes just as good, Mama's craze should stop

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I thought this was finally the end

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey blackleg, we'll take this cake from here

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As promised we won't touch the cake with anything funny...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Until Mama eats it and she's full but afterwards

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We can do whatever we want, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To calm down big mom with that cake

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lavian, fullspeed! Make sure Perospero and Bavarois don't see us

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 46 dialogue beats. Luffy and Katakuri push each other beyond technique, turning the fight into a test of conviction.
